evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Internally consistent: boto3 client with R2 endpoint URL https://{account_id}.r2.cloudflarestorage.com, region 'auto', s3v4 signature, generate_presigned_url with put_object — all standard R2 patterns. No version claim made but methods self-consistent.
evidence.executability: FastAPI and React code parse cleanly, imports present. Minor: frontend uses CRA (create-react-app) which is now deprecated but still functional; no .env file shown though os.getenv has defaults. No sandbox blockers detected.
evidence.completeness: (a) API key acquisition with dashboard menu path present; (b) pip install bash block present; (c) env var names listed in code with os.getenv (CF_ACCOUNT_ID, R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID, R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, R2_BUCKET_NAME) though no separate .env template block; (d) backend code present; (e) frontend code present; (f) test command present. Env vars consistent between listed and referenced.
evidence.citation_anchoring: No URLs to developers.cloudflare.com/r2 or any official docs cited anywhere in the playbook.

rubric_notes: docs_unavailable=true; applied long-tail handling. Playbook is internally consistent and uses correct R2-specific patterns (auto region, s3v4, r2.cloudflarestorage.com endpoint). No explicit .env template block but env vars are clearly named in os.getenv calls.
